notes: bugatti.com consumer site (returned 403/429 during Phase 1 research). Direct asset URLs sourced from Bugatti newsroom CDN (bugatti-newsroom.imgix.net); the consumer model pages reference assets on bugatti.com/-/media. Ultra-luxury low-volume manufacturer — expect low coverage if consumer site stays gated. Tourbillon is the W16 successor (V16 hybrid); W16 Mistral is the final-production W16 roadster. Bolide and Chiron family are out of scope.
